titleText: JTF News: Deutsche Welle, CBC News
mainText: Russia sentenced 15 men to life imprisonment in connection with a concert hall attack.
The International Energy Agency agreed to release a record volume of emergency oil reserves.

titleText: JTF News: BBC News, ABC News Australia
mainText: Bodies of two Chinese nationals were found in floodwaters in Australia.
Senegal lawmakers passed legislation increasing penalties for same-sex conduct to up to 10 years imprisonment.
Three brothers were arrested following an explosion at the U.S. Embassy in Oslo.
